breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. military says Iran launched 7 missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain
breaking.summary: Kuwait says it’s responding to ‘hostile’ missile and drone attacks; U.S. military says it shot down Iranian drones launched toward Strait of Hormuz

breaking.title: US-Iran Highlights: US Says It Carried Out Strikes On Iranian Radar Sites
breaking.summary: US-Iran War Highlights: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" Iranian missile attacks.

breaking.title: $24 billion 'trust test' for Trump? Khamenei aide seeks frozen assets, warns war could take 'another dimension'
breaking.summary: A potential peace deal between the US and Iran hinges on the release of $24 billion in frozen Iranian assets, according to military advisor Mohsen Rezaei. He stated that the ball is in President Trump's court to break the negotiation deadlock, proposing the funds as a test of trust. Rezaei also warned of expanded military responses if attacked again.

breaking.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
breaking.summary: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

breaking.title: Indian Man Killed In Kuwait Airport Strike Was Coming To Ujjain To Attend Niece's Wedding
breaking.summary: Manzoor Ahmed was scheduled to board a flight from Kuwait for Mumbai

breaking.title: European shares slip as Mideast tensions linger; tech stocks pause rally
breaking.summary: European shares edged lower, on track for a weekly dip as Middle East peace efforts remained uncertain. Technology stocks led the declines, pausing after a significant two-month rally. Brent crude prices rose, with diplomatic resolutions appearing unlikely amid ongoing strikes and a fragile Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

breaking.title: Indian mission in U.K. condemns disruption at Chief Justice Surya Kant event
breaking.summary: The statement followed videos circulating online that reflect a heated exchange over an attempted audience question about “growing hostility to dissent within India”, which was cut short by the event moderator

breaking.title: Cockroach Janta Party protest LIVE: 'Youth of the country will no longer fear' Abhijeet Dipke leads students, youth at Jantar Mantar protest
breaking.summary: Security intensified across Delhi as protestors demand the resignation of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan
